receive_promotion_email.description: Whether the user accepts promotional email

UserDetail.description: Grouped admin user detail response (data field of GET /users/{uid})

receive_promotion_email.description: Whether the user accepts promotional email

invite_count.description: Number of invitations where this user is inviter (invitations.inviter_id)

invitation_reward_deposit_bonus_starter_.description: invitation_rewards rows for this user: source_type=deposit_starter

invitation_reward_deposit_bonus_advanced.description: invitation_rewards rows for this user: source_type=deposit_advanced

payment_extra_info.description: Counts from user_payment_extra_infos for this user: by type (deposit/withdraw) and rows with duplicate_across_user=true

duplicate_across_user.description: Number of rows where duplicate_across_user is true

user_meta.description: Latest user_metas.value per key, JSON-decoded; null if no row or empty value

register_info.description: Decoded value from latest register_info row

latest_info.description: Decoded value from latest latest_info row

bonus_task_last_bonus_pending_active_by_.description: SUM(bonus_tasks.last_bonus) where status is pending or active, grouped by currency

vip.description: From user_vips: record (level, exp), current_level / benefits / next_level from VipLevel config

bonus.description: Reward credit totals from completed transactions (UserService::getRewardTotalsByCategory)

categories.description: Per category (check_in, bonus_task, invitation, vip_level_up, weekly_cashback): currency code -> total amount

total_by_currency.description: Sum of all reward categories per currency

invite_count.description: invitations where this user is inviter

total_reward_amount.description: Sum of reward_amount for this user (inviter) where status is paid

additionalProperties.description: Total paid reward amount for this source_type

UserVipBonusStats.description: Payload in data for GET /users/{uid}/vip-bonus-stats: weekly_cashbacks (claimed/expired) + VIP level-up cash from completed transactions

InvitationRewardAggregateByInvitationIte.description: One invitation row for an inviter with invitation_rewards summed by source_type (all statuses)

rewards_by_source_type.description: source_type -> sum(reward_amount) for this invitation_id (pending + paid)

metas.description: Key -> list of value strings (newest first per key)

UserPaymentExtraInfo.description: User saved payment field snapshot (from deposit/withdraw extra_info)

duplicate_across_user.description: Whether this snapshot is flagged as duplicated across users

total_claimed.description: SUM(base_bonus) only for rows with status=claimed

total.description: SUM(amount) for status=claimed in this currency

total_claimed_by_currency.description: Claimed amount totals grouped by currency

WeeklyCashback.description: User weekly cashback period record; list may include loaded user

period.description: ISO week code: isoWeekYear * 100 + isoWeek (same as dateToPeriod)

period_start_at.description: Monday 00:00:00 start of the ISO week (app timezone); null if period is invalid

period_end_at.description: Sunday end of day end of the ISO week (app timezone); null if period is invalid

Transaction.description: Wallet ledger row; list responses may include loaded user

deletable.description: If false, DELETE is rejected (protected row)

translations.description: All translations for the category name

is_in_maintenance.description: Whether brand is currently in maintenance

name_translations.description: All translations for the game name

translations.description: All translations for the category name
All translations for the game group name in {locale: value} format

two_factor_enabled.description: 是否已绑定双因素认证

enabled.description: Whether the payment method is enabled

PaymentMethodFieldConfig.description: Shared field definitions for payment methods (deposit/withdraw)

agent_links_count.description: 推广链接数量（列表时返回）

agent_links.description: 关联的推广链接（show 时返回）

promotion_code.description: 推广码（4位纯字母，唯一，创建时由服务端自动生成）
